label: Mountain Home
summary: Insular mining and herding village built into the lower slopes watching the surrounding passes.
notes: Migrated and normalized from legacy Land of Legends lore and settlement storage.
description: Mountain Home is built into the lower slopes of the surrounding peaks, where herders, stoneworkers, and wardens of ancient trails live under the belief that the mountains are alive in a slow, deliberate way. It is cautious, rich in old customs, and deeply suspicious of anything that comes from beyond the ridges.

details.economy: Mining, herding, and stonework sustain the village, while river barges bring fish and produce from Lake Home.
details.culture: Mountain Home is insular, cautious, rich in old customs, and deeply suspicious of anything that comes from beyond the ridges.
